title: Typing indicators are relay-enforced sender identity, not client-supplied
description: The TypingNotifyParams.from field is always set from the authenticated pub_id on the relay side (ws.rs), never from client-supplied params. This prevents a client from spoofing another user's typing state. A contributor might suggest 'let the client set the from field for flexibility' — this would be a security regression. The relay must always override from with the session-authenticated identity.
close_reason: decision recorded in beads for future contributor reference
